skill_disposition: Genuine PASS at round 11. v1.8.0 → v1.8.1 (3 implementation bugs) → v1.9.0 (2 schema improvements: 5 modification classes + kansei_primary_addresser matrix). Each iteration found progressively finer-grained issues; the system converged when the matrix was added AND per-decision claims were normalized to its DAG.

All 5 modification classes (闸 3) correctly applied. kansei_primary_addresser matrix complete (7/7 user kansei, composed correctly null with kansei_unaddressable record, no A↔B cycles, DAG holds). Adaptation soundness strong, internal_consistency claims hold against DESIGN.md.
